text:
Sorry, some errors in my previous post:


"Don't know how it scales exactly (linear, quadratic or exponential) nor if it scales with traffic or the amount of pppoe clients but it sure if one of them of a mix of them." should be:

"I don't know how it scales exactly (linear, quadratic or exponential) nor if it scales with traffic or the amount of pppoe clients but it sure is one of them or a mix of them."
